title: Visual Design Upgrade & Progress Tracking
summary: Visual Design stuck at 7/10 for 5 days. This day elevates the visual quality: refined gate rendering with proper logic symbols, improved level cards with best time/stars, progress bar showing overall completion, and a polished color palette. Also adding keyboard shortcut hints.

tasks.description: Improve gate rendering — draw proper logic gate symbols (AND shape, OR curve, NOT triangle, XOR with double curve) instead of just text labels in boxes. Use canvas paths for clean vector rendering.
acceptance_criteria: AND gate rendered as D-shape with flat back
OR gate rendered as curved shield shape
NOT gate rendered as triangle with bubble
XOR gate rendered as OR shape with double input line
All gates maintain proper pin positions
Gates scale correctly at all canvas sizes

tasks.description: Add completion progress bar to level select — shows X/15 levels completed, percentage, total stars earned
acceptance_criteria: Progress bar visible at top of level select
Shows X/15 levels and total stars

tasks.description: Show best time on completed level cards in the level select grid
acceptance_criteria: Completed level cards show best time in mm:ss format
Time appears below the star display

tasks.description: Add keyboard shortcut display — small '?' button that shows hotkeys overlay (Ctrl+Z undo, Delete remove, etc.)
acceptance_criteria: Clicking shows overlay with keyboard shortcuts
Overlay dismissible by clicking or pressing Escape
Lists: Ctrl+Z undo, Ctrl+Y redo, Delete/Backspace remove, right-click delete

testing_focus: Gate symbols render correctly for all types
Best time displays on level cards
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
